zh.lifeSummary: 當Dirk I van Voorne於大約1135年出生在荷蘭霍蘭奧斯特賀內時，他的父親Hugo III van Voorne28歲，母親Hadewich van Holland26歲。他於大約1168年與Hadewich van Naaldwijk結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於從1198年到1229年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Beveren-Leie, Waregem, West Flanders, Be: 比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫瓦雷格姆貝福倫勒
zh-hans.Oostvoorne, South Holland, Netherlands: 荷兰-拉藍德奧斯特賀內
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dirk I van Voorne于大约1135年出生在荷兰霍蘭奧斯特賀內时，他的父亲Hugo III van Voorne28岁，母亲Hadewich van Holland26岁。他于大约1168年与Hadewich van Naaldwijk结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于从1198年到1229年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Dirk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch form of Derek . Its use in the English-speaking world since the 1960s is largely due to the fame of the actor Dirk Bogarde ( 1921–99 , born Derek Niven van den Bogaerde ). He was of Dutch descent, although he was actually born in Scotland. The manly image of the name has been reinforced by its coincidence in form with Scottish dirk ‘dagger’ (from Gaelic durc).

en.lifeSummary: When Dirk I van Voorne was born about 1135, in Oostvoorne, Holland, Netherlands, his father, Hugo III van Voorne, was 28 and his mother, Hadewich van Holland, was 26. He married Hadewich van Naaldwijk about 1168. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died from 1198 to 1229, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dirk I van Voorne est né environ 1135, à Oostvoorne, Holland, Pays-Bas, son père, Hugo III van Voorne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Hadewich van Holland, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Hadewich van Naaldwijk environ 1168. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé du 1198 au 1229, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dirk I van Voorne um 1135 in Oostvoorne, Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugo III van Voorne 28 und seine Mutter Hadewich van Holland 26. Er hat um 1168 Hadewich van Naaldwijk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb von 1198 bis 1229 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dirk I van Voorne è nato il circa 1135 nel Oostvoorne, Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Hugo III van Voorne, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Hadewich van Holland, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Hadewich van Naaldwijk circa 1168. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì da 1198 a 1229, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Oostvoorne, Holland, Netherlands: オランダホーランドオオストボオルン
ja.Beveren-Leie, Waregem, West Flanders, Be: ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンワーエジェムベバーエン-レイ
ja.Oostvoorne, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドオオストボオルン
ja.lifeSummary: Dirk I van Voorneが約1135年にオランダホーランドオオストボオルンで生まれた時，父Hugo III van Voorneは28歳，母Hadewich van Hollandは26歳であった。約1168年にHadewich van Naaldwijkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼はから1198年まで1229年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dirk I van Voorne(이)가 대략 1135년 네덜란드 홀랜드 스트보른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugo III van Voorne(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Hadewich van Holland(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1168년 Hadewich van Naaldwijk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1198년 부터 1229년 까지 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dirk I van Voorne nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Oostvoorne, Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Hugo III van Voorne, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Hadewich van Holland, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Hadewich van Naaldwijk aproximadamente 1168. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu de 1198 a 1229, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dirk I van Voorne родился около 1135 г. в местности уствурн, холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Hugo III van Voorne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Hadewich van Holland, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Hadewich van Naaldwijk около 1168 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер с 1198 по 1229 в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dirk I van Voorne nació aproximadamente 1135, en Oostvoorne, Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Hugo III van Voorne, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Hadewich van Holland, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Hadewich van Naaldwijk aproximadamente 1168. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió desde 1198 hasta 1229, en su pueblo.
